name: obsidian-bible-reference-monorepo
description: Monorepo for the Obsidian Bible Reference plugin and the bible-reference-toolkit packages.

scripts.build:packages: bun run --filter bible-book-names-intl build && bun run --filter bible-reference-toolkit build
scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter obsidian-bible-reference build
scripts.precommit: bun run lint && bun run prettier

author: tim-hub
